egora.description: Architecting enterprise-scale Android & Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) ecosystems. Led a 40% performance gain in mission-critical hardware integrations and designed shared multiplatform codebases with a zero-failure deployment record.
achievements: Shipped 3 production apps across Android and KMP

healthwire.description: Revolutionized healthcare delivery via advanced Google Maps location intelligence. Scaled a modular Clean Architecture core that streamlined client applications for thousands of active daily healthcare providers.

dongamers.description: Engineered high-frequency e-sports systems handling real-time chat and tournament data. Successfully solved high-latency challenges in global gaming platforms with 92% reactive state stability.

netroots.description: Developed high-retention consumer Android apps with a focus on UI/UX excellence and robust RESTful API integrations using Kotlin.
